feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to consume BPA destination in the Fiori template in BAS?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have created a Build Process and after deployment i created a BPA destination using all the necessary additional properties in BTP Cockpit .

When UI guy is trying to add service this destination is not appearing in the list . Just want to understand is it possible to directly consume BPA instance in BAS or not? If yes then please guide on this.

Kindly share your inputs.

Thanks!

entry.title: WEb Application /dist cap
entry.content:
Hi

When I build a cap application with a ui module, the dist folder is generated but it is not deleted afterwards.
When I access it, it is shown in web applications
Why is this happening?

 

 

Thanks

entry.title: Adaptation projects in Business Application Studio broken suddenly as of Oct 22
entry.content:
Has a new change to Adaptation Projects just been rolled out? I was editing adaptation projects, running them and deploying them as late as yesterday however today none of them are working. The old Adaptation Project Preview and Visual Editor and deploy options are missing from the menu for all of my projects.

I don't know if it is relevant but I tried creating a new adaptation project from template but I am unable to select any SAP UI5 version except the latest and it gives a message saying the project will not be usable on my system:

entry.title: how to consume ODATA while performing CRUD operation in SAP BAS trail version
entry.content:
Im trying to use Northwind service (Entityset - Employees), but unable to give proper ODATA service url or is it restricted to use NW services for CRUD on Trail version.

Kindly assist.

entry.title: Mock Data Editor is not opening is SAP BAS
entry.content:
Hello all,
I am trying to open Data Editor in SAP BAS for SAPUI5 freestyle app and we are using OData V2 version CAP service in UI5 app.
I am getting below error while I try to open Data Editor, please suggest.

 

Thank you.

entry.title: How to deploy Angular or React App to SAP Fiori Launchpad
entry.content:
I have developed React and Angular Web Applications through BAS that I need to deploy on SAP Fiori Launchpad, the same as we deploy our Custom Fiori App(Created through BAS or WEBIDE) to the SAP Fiori Launchpad is there any way we can achieve this? I have gone through the links below but they don't answer what I am looking for.

Links:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-portal-cloud-foundry-getting-started.html

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/how-to-run-reactjs-web-apps-in-sap/ba-p/13455919

entry.title: Deploy to different BTP subaccount with Cloud Connector destination
entry.content:
Dear experts, please advise how to use the Cloud Connector destination configured on a different BTP subaccount than the one where my MTA app was developed.

My environment:

edit - diagram for the environment

 

- there are 2 BTP accounts and respective subbacounts, one for SAP BAS and one for SAP Build Work Zone. My app was developed in SAP BAS on the first, and now needs to be deployed to the second

- there is a Cloud connector destination on each BTP account, with principal propagation, towards the same on-premise ABAP system. These destinations have exactly the same name "D1_PP" and identical attributes on both BTP accounts. I already verified both to be working correctly. According to this resource, it should be possible to use the new subbact destination if it has been configured identically:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/deploy-app-from-own-bas-to-custom-cloud-foundry/qaq-p/12647946

- on the SAP BAS account there is also an older destination to the same on-prem ABAP with basic authentification. It was used for the development onset but since abandoned. That one has a different name, "D1". Also, the Build Work Zone used to be active on the old account but was since deactivated and is now not available.

- The MTA packaging and deployment was originally carried out when the app was using the old destination D1. It worked there without issues. Only then did the environment changed, removed Build Work Zone subscription from first to second BTP account and created the new destinations D1_PP on both. And the task is now to switch to new destination and deploy to new subaccount

- at the moment there are no issues in either switching in SAP BAS to D1_PP, neither in deployment to new BTP. The app appears in the HTML5 Apps section of the new subaccount, the destination instances appear in the CF space. However the app does not start, with message "...completed with status 500 Error while retrieving destination D1 from destination service. HTTP status code: 404...". So apparently the app is trying to use the old destination, not the new one.

- I did check the xs-app.json, the destination there is correctly set to new name D1_PP. I assume that the old name still lingers somewhere in the MTA files but I do not know where to look.

Thank you in advance for any suggestions how to proceed.

Petra Milinkovic

 

 

-

entry.title: EKEYTYPE: The key argument has to be of type `string` or `number`. Found: `undefined` in CAP.
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

GoodDay!

This issue was raised in between the development (when adding attachment feature to my CAP application – used @cap-js/sdm library as mentioned in CAPIRE documentation)

Below is the structure of my header and attachment entity.

InvoiceHeader – Entity

Attachment – Entity

I’ve implemented a custom handler for InvoiceHeader entity on Update event.

I’m running my application in a hybrid mode and I’m opening my annotated UI application (built using FPM). When trying to edit a record and saving it showing me the below error.

             EKEYTYPE: The key argument has to be of type `string` or `number`. Found: `undefined`

When I’m debugging it, the error was coming from the SELECT statement (which was working previously) line no.103 like in the below screenshot. However the query executed successfully where you can see the result in aHeaders variable.

I’m sure “ID” is the only key for InvoiceHeader Entity and the value is coming via “req.data.ID” parameter.

I’m trying to figure it out, I’m not sure where I’m lagging.

Help me to resolve this issue.

Thanks in Advance!!

Best Regards

Boopalan M

SAP Business Application Studio , SAP Cloud Application Programming Model ,

SAP HANA Cloud , SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database

entry.title: How to access HTML5 Application in SAP BTP Cloud Foundry from mobile device
entry.content:
I create app in BAS and deploy to SAP BTP Cloud Foundry.

I would like to access this app from mobile device.

Is it possible to access like via app url or something?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: index.html missing while genereting app within BAS with CAP local project and SAP Fiori Elements
entry.content:
While I generate app within BAS devspace with CAP local project as data source and SAP Fiori Elements the output does not contain index.html file.

It seems like there is an issue with this generator. As I run this generator project I see error message: index.html does not exist. 

"Fiori App Generator - The Application wizard would have generated 4 html files: webapp/index.html, webapp/test/flpSandbox.html and webapp/test/testsuite.qunit.html and webapp/test/integration/opaTests.qunit.html for each UI component (in folder app/<component> you generate with it. The file webapp/index.html is host the component directly without fiori lanuchpad sandbox environment."

entry.title: How to save Odata data in SAP BUILD APP in PDF format.
entry.content:
I am created a project in SAP Build App and data in coming from Odata link in UI also.
Now, I want to save that data in PDF format.

entry.title: Decimal Validation Error in SAP CAP Application After Updating to Latest Dependencies
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm facing an issue in my SAP CAP (Cloud Application Programming) application after updating to the latest versions of dependencies. Previously, everything worked smoothly, but now I am encountering validation errors for decimal fields in my UI5 frontend.

Error Details:

When entering values in fields like "Capacity [m³/h]", "Delivery Head [m]", "Pressure [bar]", and "Fluid Temperature [°C]", I get errors stating that values in scientific notation (e.g., 2.3e+3 or 1.45e+2) are "not a valid Decimal".
I have attached screenshots showing the validation errors in the application and the list of the updated dependency versions for reference.

Steps Taken:

I updated several dependencies, including @Pr_Si/cds, @Pr_Si/ui5-cli, and others, as shown in the attached screenshot.
After the updates, the error started appearing in fields that previously accepted decimal inputs in scientific notation.                                                                                   

Has anyone else encountered this issue after updating to newer versions of SAP CAP or UI5 dependencies? Any guidance on what might be causing this decimal validation error and how to fix it would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Does anyone know why after deploying the app to workzone, the view looks different?
entry.content:
Hey guys, 
Can anyone tell me why when testing the application directly from BAS I have a more centralized view with spaces on the left and right as shown in the purple arrow below?

When deploying the same app in the Work Zone, the screen view changes, losing these side spaces.

Does anyone know how to solve this and leave these side spaces?

entry.title: 404 Not Found: Requested route ('859a5208trial-dev-nsdemosampleapp-approuter.cfapps.us10-001.hana.on
HC300 deploying CVD_PD Error 170057 No visible output defined; all attributes or measures are hidden
entry.content:
I'm working on the exercises for HC300 and am stuck.  Page 34 of the exercises, task 2.  I've created projection CVD_PD and put in the four columns, closed, and clicked deploy.  I get Error 170057 No visible output defined; all attributes or measures are hidden.  It's like it didn't save the columns I picked? 

I go back into "Expand Details Panel" and the four columns are still there.

entry.title: SAP MDK capabilities like charts for web and chat bot like UI layout for mobile
entry.content:
Hi All,

Few queries around sap MDK app development, please help me to find the answers.

Note:  I use BAS for development.

1. is it possible to build chat bot like UI layout(refer below sample design) using MDK, as its not free style UI5 app I am finding it difficult to bring up complex designs.

2. I am using MDK control 'Chart Content' but it only supports mobile, how to build charts for web too ? also 'Chart content' doesn't have pie chart ? 

3. I want to call an odata service entity and do some processing and setup some global variables to hold different data sets to use across different pages, is it possible in MDK ?

4. Do we have any portal where sample designs with source code are given to showcase SAP MDK's UI capabilities ? something like demokit for Fiori ? I found this https://github.com/SAP-samples/cloud-mdk-samples/tree/main/Showcase_Apps but I feel that there should be more design samples showcased somewhere else ?

@Jitendra_Kansal  @bill_froelich Plz throw some light here when you can.

entry.title: executeHttpRequest returns: "Failed to load destination" inside of Promise.all
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I am currently trying to run parallel httpRequests in my CAP Project via Promise.all().

When I start my service in BAS and run the function for the first time, with at least two calls, I get the error message: “Failed to load destination”. When I run it again, it runs without errors.
Also when I start my service in BAS and run the function for the first time, with one call, there is no error message.

This is my Promise.all() call.

for (const oObj of aObjects) {
 aViewRequests.push((async () => await extAPI_content.readView(sEnvironment, sSpace, oObj.technicalName))());
// Inside of this function the Method _callDatasphereAPI is called which is listed down bellow.
}

const oSpaceObjectsDetails = await Promise.all(aViewRequests);

...

// here the implementation of the executeHttpRequest
async function _callDatasphereAPI(oRequestOptions, bMinimizeLogs) {
	let oResponse = null;

	try {
		if (!bMinimizeLogs) {
			LOG._debug && LOG.debug(`${FILEIDENT}|Call DS Wrapper - Query Parameters: ${JSON.stringify(oRequestOptions)}`);
		} else {
			LOG._debug &&
				LOG.debug(
					`${FILEIDENT}|Call DS Wrapper - Environment: ${oRequestOptions?.data?.environment}, Method: ${oRequestOptions?.method}, URL: ${oRequestOptions?.url}`
				);
		}

		if (!oRequestOptions.method || !oRequestOptions.url) {
			throw "Http request have missing properties.";
		}

		oRequestOptions["middleware"] = [timeout(120000)];

		oResponse = await executeHttpRequest(
			{
				destinationName: "datasphere-wrapper-api"
			},
			oRequestOptions
		);
	} catch (error) {
		if (error?.response) {
			oResponse = error.response;
		} else {
			oResponse = {
				status: -1,
				message: !error.message ? error : error.message
			};
		}
	}

	return oResponse;
}

This error only occurs when I run the app locally in BAS. If I deploy the app, this error does not occur.
INFO: Locally I bound the destination service instance from the BTP to execute the calls.

This is the exact error message:
ErrorWithCause: Failed to load destination.
Caused by:
ErrorWithCause: Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type "destination".
Caused by:
Error: Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type destination: HTTP request [XsuaaService.fetchClientCredentialsToken] to https://<Link>/oauth/token could not be sent due to: FetchError: request to https://<Link>/oauth/token timed out..

Maybe anyone also tried the Promise.all with async/await calls.
If yes, please help me out.

Thanks,
Jonas

entry.title: Error in Adaptation Project with reuse component
entry.content:
Hi!

I have created a adaptation project for F2071 standard Fiori application and replaced the Odata service with enhanced one. List page is working fine but Object page is not loading due attachment service component usage at object page level. I have also tried using "Add UI5 reuse component" step but didn't worked. 

Any suggestions, how can I resolve this issue.

Thanks!

SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: RAP Odata V4 APIs from S4HANA public cloud not visible in BAS
entry.content:
I have created a RAP Application in S4HANA Public cloud using ADT. I have expodes this application as an OData V4 UI service. The preview of the application works fine.

I created a BTP destination for the S4HANA Public Cloud dev system (client 080).
The destination properties have WebIDEEnabled = true and WebIDEUsage = odata_abap,dev_abap,odata_gen

In SAP Business Application Studio, when I create a Fiori List Report using Template and choose the S4HANA public cloud destination, I am unable to find my Odata V4 service.I can see only OData V2 services.

I could not find much hints in SAP community blogs except that in few blogs they have mentioned settings w.r.t /IWFND/CONFIG and other V4 service group nodes but then all of these are On Premise related.

Is there a restriction on the availability of OData V4 Service in BAS? Or am I missing any configuration.

entry.title: How to deploy full stack cloud application(CAP + SAPUI5) to BTP Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Can someone help to deploy Full Stack Cloud Application to Cloud Foundry which is developed in BAS using CAP and SAPUI5?.  I am not using SAP Hana Cloud or any kind of  database. Its getting data from S/4 Hana Public Cloud system with destination.

I tried to deploy, it got deployed successfully but when i access app using provided URL, i am getting one error in logs as "msg":"x-forwarded-path header: undefined"} and "msg":"query does not exist for request url /"}. Please help me if someone came across this kind of situation.

I appreciate your response in advance.

Regards,

Omkar B.
